title: Fix duplicate report runs creating extra report records
description:
## Intent
Ensure a single user-triggered report run creates exactly one report record.

## Definition of done
- One click/action triggers one report run
- No duplicate report records from same trigger
- Root cause documented in Kanbus comments

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Investigating duplicate report dispatch: user action appears to create 4 reports instead of 1. Tracing UI run trigger, backend mutation path, and any duplicate side effects/subscriptions.

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Data point: report records are truly duplicated in backend (distinct report IDs + distinct task IDs clustered within same second), not just UI list duplication. Implemented frontend dispatch idempotency guard in ReportConfigurationDialog + RunReportButton: single in-flight dispatch, await onDispatch, and disable repeated submits while dispatching.

comments.author: derek
comments.text: New evidence from browser Network: exactly one GraphQL createTask mutation is sent per click (single task id d311ab31-cea3-45c1-8abf-277e4a5b717f). This rules out frontend multi-submit. Next fix: enforce backend idempotency at report creation path so one task_id can materialize at most one Report record, even if dispatcher/worker redelivers.

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Implemented backend idempotency for report materialization: Report.create now accepts explicit report_id and _generate_report_core now uses report_id=task_id (deterministic one-report-per-task key). If duplicate worker execution races and create fails, service now loads existing report by task_id and exits duplicate invocation as no-op. Updated tests in plexus/reports/service_test.py and plexus/reports/test_service_integration.py. Local test run blocked in this shell because pytest is not installed (ModuleNotFoundError: No module named pytest).

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Implementing targeted fix: preserve incoming --task-id in plexus.cli report run. Current code resets task_id to None at function start, causing duplicate executions to spawn new tasks/reports instead of binding to original task.

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Validation after patch: replayed report run with --task-id 54647b2c-98f4-4f07-96ac-da625e87adca now prints 'Using existing task from Celery' and returns Report ID/Task ID both equal to 54647b2c-98f4-4f07-96ac-da625e87adca. No new task ID minted in this path.

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Evidence from report/task inspection: duplicate report IDs 5284c048-... and 4cd37eeb-... map to different task IDs (4c797b6b-... and 4cd37eeb-...). Both tasks are type=report_generation and dispatchStatus=SYNC, created at the same second (21:42:23 UTC). This indicates repeated execution of 'report run' is creating fresh internal sync tasks/reports each time, not UI list duplication. Likely worker still running pre-fix code path that drops --task-id, so retries/replays fan out into extra SYNC task/report records.

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Starting production investigation for renewed duplicate report generation and missing identifiers after main deploy/restart. Plan: 1) verify service/process topology on i-06eb3644c23887cc9 via SSM, 2) verify deployed code version and specific edited files on host, 3) trace runtime path that writes report identifiers, 4) capture corrective actions.

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Findings from version-path investigation: production worker on i-06eb3644c23887cc9 executes installed package from /home/ec2-user/miniconda3/envs/py311/lib/python3.11/site-packages (not ~/projects/Plexus source). Local Call-Criteria-Python pin is plexus git tag v1.27.0. Identifier/report fixes are commits 14a4b972/f1c8e194/0220c90d; none are contained in release tag v1.29.0 (git merge-base checks fail), so pinned env cannot include them yet. This explains missing identifiers despite dashboard deploy and worker restart.

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Applying minimal semantic-release-safe fix: remove unused Card import from dashboard/components/ui/feedback-item-view.tsx; will validate with dashboard typecheck and commit with conventional fix: message.

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Completed minimal semantic-release-oriented fix commit: 58b9b36f (fix(ui): remove unused Card import in feedback item view). Verified with dashboard typecheck (pass). Commit touches only dashboard/components/ui/feedback-item-view.tsx.

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Re-checked duplicate run attribution for reports d36714bc-..., 968292f4-..., 36859634-... using Plexus report/task records + SSM log search. Confirmed one duplicate path on i-06eb3644c23887cc9 (ip-172-31-40-89): report 36859634-... and task 9a402fe2-... appear in plexus-command-worker.service journal. Other two IDs/tasks do not appear in that unit log and do not appear on sibling Linux hosts (i-09a460..., i-0fca5d...), indicating an additional execution path outside that systemd unit (another host/process/runtime path).
